case_title: REINHARDT RICHARD W VS STANDARD ROOFING COMPANY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $900.00 FILED BY REINHARDT RICHARD W AS TO DEFENDANT STANDARD ROOFING COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-07-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
TRIAL RESET TO JAN-18-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07 TRIAL OF JAN-07-1991 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REINHARDT RICHARD W RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STANDARD ROOFING COMPANY $900.00 PRINCIPAL, $12.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $912.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT STANDARD ROOFING COMPANY HEARING SET FOR FEB-27-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02

SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF FEB-27-1991, GRANTED
